_source: Hisnul Muslim (Fortress of the Muslim) by Sa'id ibn Wahf al-Qahtani. Arabic text transcribed exactly as printed in the standard Saudi edition. Transliteration follows academic conventions. English and French translations are faithful renderings of the meaning.
_license: Adhkar content is from Islamic tradition (Sunnah). This file is a structured transcription for use in a software application.

morning.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
morning.transliteration: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa-l-ḥayyu-l-qayyūm, lā ta'khudhuhū sinatun wa lā nawm, lahū mā fī-s-samāwāti wa mā fī-l-arḍ, man dha-l-ladhī yashfa'u 'indahū illā bi-idhnih, ya'lamu mā bayna aydīhim wa mā khalfahum, wa lā yaḥīṭūna bi-shay'in min 'ilmihī illā bi-mā shā', wasi'a kursiyyuhu-s-samāwāti wa-l-arḍ, wa lā ya'ūduhu ḥifẓuhumā, wa huwa-l-'aliyyu-l-'aẓīm.
morning.translation_en: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
morning.translation_fr: Allah — il n'y a de dieu que Lui, le Vivant, le Demeurant. Ni sommeil ne Le prend ni sommeil. À Lui appartient ce qui est dans les cieux et ce qui est sur la terre. Qui est celui qui peut intercéder auprès de Lui sans Sa permission ? Il connaît ce qui est devant eux et ce qui est derrière eux, et ils ne comprennent rien de Sa science, sauf ce qu'Il veut. Son Kursi s'étend sur les cieux et la terre, et leur garde ne Lui cause aucune fatigue. Et Il est le Très-Haut, le Très-Grand.

morning.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
morning.transliteration: Qul huwa Allāhu aḥad, Allāhuṣ-ṣamad, lam yalid wa lam yūlad, wa lam yakun lahū kufuwan aḥad.
morning.translation_en: Say, 'He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is begotten, nor is there to Him any equivalent.'
morning.translation_fr: Dis : « C'est Allah, l'Un. Allah, le Seul à être imploré. Il n'engendre pas et n'est pas engendré, et nul n'est Son égal. »

morning.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
morning.transliteration: Qul a'ūdhu bi-rabbi-l-falaq, min sharri mā khalaq, wa min sharri ghāsiqin idhā waqab, wa min sharri-n-naffāthāti fī-l-'uqad, wa min sharri ḥāsidin idhā ḥasad.
morning.translation_en: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, from the evil of that which He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles, and from the evil of the blowers in knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies.'
morning.translation_fr: Dis : « Je cherche refuge dans le Seigneur de l'aube, contre le mal de ce qu'Il a créé, contre le mal de l'obscurité quand elle s'étend, contre le mal des souffleuses dans les nœuds, contre le mal de l'envieux quand il envie. »

morning.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
morning.transliteration: Qul a'ūdhu bi-rabbi-n-nās, maliki-n-nās, ilāhi-n-nās, min sharr-i-l-waswāsi-l-khannās, alladhī yuwaswisu fī ṣudūri-n-nās, mina-l-jinnati wa-n-nās.
morning.translation_en: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer — who whispers into the breasts of mankind — from among the jinn and mankind.'
morning.translation_fr: Dis : « Je cherche refuge dans le Seigneur des hommes, le Souverain des hommes, le Dieu des hommes, contre le mal du chuchoteur qui se retire, celui qui murmure dans les poitrines des hommes, parmi les djinns et les hommes. »

morning.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
morning.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah, lahū-l-mulku wa lahū-l-ḥamdu wa huwa 'alā kulli shay'in qadīr.
morning.translation_en: There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things.
morning.translation_fr: Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, seul, sans associé. À Lui appartient la souveraineté et à Lui appartient la louange, et Il est omnipotent sur toute chose.

morning.translation_en: Glory be to Allah and with His praise.
morning.translation_fr: Gloire à Allah etLouange à Lui.

morning.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَلَا نَعْبُدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ، لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ
morning.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah, lahū-l-mulku wa lahū-l-ḥamdu wa huwa 'alā kulli shay'in qadīr, lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā bi-llāh, lā ilāha illā Allāhu wa lā na'budu illā iyyāh, lahū-n-ni'matu wa lahū-l-faḍlu wa lahū-th-thanā'u-l-ḥasan, lā ilāha illā Allāhu mukhliṣīna lahu-d-dīna wa law kariha-l-kāfirūn.
morning.translation_en: There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things. There is no power nor might except with Allah. There is no god but Allah and we worship none but Him. To Him belongs all blessing, to Him belongs all grace, and to Him belongs all praiseworthy commendation. There is no god but Allah, being sincere to Him in religion, even if the disbelievers dislike it.
morning.translation_fr: Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, seul, sans associé. À Lui appartient la souveraineté et à Lui appartient la louange, et Il est omnipotent sur toute chose. Il n'y a de puissance ni de force qu'en Allah. Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah et nous n'adorons que Lui. À Lui reviennent les bienfaits, à Lui revient la grâce et à Lui revient la louange digne. Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, Lui attribuant un culte exclusif, même si les infidèles le détestent.

evening.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
evening.transliteration: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa-l-ḥayyu-l-qayyūm, lā ta'khudhuhū sinatun wa lā nawm, lahū mā fī-s-samāwāti wa mā fī-l-arḍ, man dha-l-ladhī yashfa'u 'indahū illā bi-idhnih, ya'lamu mā bayna aydīhim wa mā khalfahum, wa lā yaḥīṭūna bi-shay'in min 'ilmihī illā bi-mā shā', wasi'a kursiyyuhu-s-samāwāti wa-l-arḍ, wa lā ya'ūduhu ḥifẓuhumā, wa huwa-l-'aliyyu-l-'aẓīm.
evening.translation_en: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
evening.translation_fr: Allah — il n'y a de dieu que Lui, le Vivant, le Demeurant. Ni sommeil ne Le prend ni sommeil. À Lui appartient ce qui est dans les cieux et ce qui est sur la terre. Qui est celui qui peut intercéder auprès de Lui sans Sa permission ? Il connaît ce qui est devant eux et ce qui est derrière eux, et ils ne comprennent rien de Sa science, sauf ce qu'Il veut. Son Kursi s'étend sur les cieux et la terre, et leur garde ne Lui cause aucune fatigue. Et Il est le Très-Haut, le Très-Grand.

evening.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
evening.transliteration: Qul huwa Allāhu aḥad, Allāhuṣ-ṣamad, lam yalid wa lam yūlad, wa lam yakun lahū kufuwan aḥad.
evening.translation_en: Say, 'He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is begotten, nor is there to Him any equivalent.'
evening.translation_fr: Dis : « C'est Allah, l'Un. Allah, le Seul à être imploré. Il n'engendre pas et n'est pas engendré, et nul n'est Son égal. »

evening.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۝ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
evening.transliteration: Qul a'ūdhu bi-rabbi-l-falaq, min sharri mā khalaq, wa min sharri ghāsiqin idhā waqab, wa min sharri-n-naffāthāti fī-l-'uqad, wa min sharri ḥāsidin idhā ḥasad.
evening.translation_en: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, from the evil of that which He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles, and from the evil of the blowers in knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies.'
evening.translation_fr: Dis : « Je cherche refuge dans le Seigneur de l'aube, contre le mal de ce qu'Il a créé, contre le mal de l'obscurité quand elle s'étend, contre le mal des souffleuses dans les nœuds, contre le mal de l'envieux quand il envie. »

evening.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
evening.transliteration: Qul a'ūdhu bi-rabbi-n-nās, maliki-n-nās, ilāhi-n-nās, min sharr-i-l-waswāsi-l-khannās, alladhī yuwaswisu fī ṣudūri-n-nās, mina-l-jinnati wa-n-nās.
evening.translation_en: Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer — who whispers into the breasts of mankind — from among the jinn and mankind.'
evening.translation_fr: Dis : « Je cherche refuge dans le Seigneur des hommes, le Souverain des hommes, le Dieu des hommes, contre le mal du chuchoteur qui se retire, celui qui murmure dans les poitrines des hommes, parmi les djinns et les hommes. »

evening.translation_en: I believe in Allah and His Messengers.
evening.translation_fr: Je crois en Allah et en Ses messagers.

evening.translation_en: Glory be to Allah and with His praise.
evening.translation_fr: Gloire à Allah et louange à Lui.

evening.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَلَا نَعْبُدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ، لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ
evening.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah, lahū-l-mulku wa lahū-l-ḥamdu wa huwa 'alā kulli shay'in qadīr, lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā bi-llāh, lā ilāha illā Allāhu wa lā na'budu illā iyyāh, lahū-n-ni'matu wa lahū-l-faḍlu wa lahū-th-thanā'u-l-ḥasan, lā ilāha illā Allāhu mukhliṣīna lahu-d-dīna wa law kariha-l-kāfirūn.
evening.translation_en: There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things. There is no power nor might except with Allah. There is no god but Allah and we worship none but Him. To Him belongs all blessing, to Him belongs all grace, and to Him belongs all praiseworthy commendation. There is no god but Allah, being sincere to Him in religion, even if the disbelievers dislike it.
evening.translation_fr: Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, seul, sans associé. À Lui appartient la souveraineté et à Lui appartient la louange, et Il est omnipotent sur toute chose. Il n'y a de puissance ni de force qu'en Allah. Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah et nous n'adorons que Lui. À Lui reviennent les bienfaits, à Lui revient la grâce et à Lui revient la louange digne. Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, Lui attribuant un culte exclusif, même si les infidèles le détestent.

post_prayer.translation_en: All praise is due to Allah.

post_prayer.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
post_prayer.transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāhu waḥdahū lā sharīka lah, lahū-l-mulku wa lahū-l-ḥamdu wa huwa 'alā kulli shay'in qadīr.
post_prayer.translation_en: There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He has power over all things.
post_prayer.translation_fr: Il n'y a de dieu qu'Allah, seul, sans associé. À Lui appartient la souveraineté et à Lui appartient la louange, et Il est omnipotent sur toute chose.
